steps.title: Identify the initial value
steps.content: The model starts with the population in $2008$, so the initial value is $18{,}000$.

steps.title: Use the growth factor
steps.content: A yearly increase of $3\%$ means the population is multiplied by $$1+0.03=1.03$$ After $x$ years, the model is $$p=18{,}000(1.03)^x$$ The answer is D.
